steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The notes contrast two sculptures by the same artist: Through uses forged steel while TTI London uses weathering steel. The correct choice must emphasize this specific material distinction.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — omits material detail: Makes a general claim about the artist without referencing the steel-type difference noted in the materials. ✗
  • Choice B — omits material detail: Discusses the works in general terms without mentioning forged versus weathering steel. ✗
  • Choice C — contrasts steel types: Directly references forged steel (Through) versus weathering steel (TTI London), matching the distinction in the notes. ✓
  • Choice D — omits material detail: Presents a statement irrelevant to the steel-type distinction between the two sculptures. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
